/usr/bin/aarch64-redhat-linux-g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/carbonqt.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/carbonqt.dir/carbonqt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqt.dir/carbonqt_cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqt.dir/backend/src/SystemMonitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqt.dir/backend/src/ProcessTracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqt.dir/backend/src/EnergyEstimator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqt.dir/backend/src/ContextSwitchAnalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/carbonqt.dir/backend/src/DataLogger.cpp.o -o carbonqt  /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 -lsqlite3
